.status-bar.background: rgb(30, 30, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(0, 176, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(245, 0, 87, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 82, 82, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(124, 77, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 82, 82, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 184, 212, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(68, 138, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 160, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 184, 212, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 145, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(30, 30, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(46, 46, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

strong.background: rgba(138, 92, 245, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
